title: BITS Pilani – Research Fellow – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Research Fellow. Candidates Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 15-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through BITS Pilani official website.

qualification.education_qualification: ME/M.Tech in Civil (Structural) or Mechanical or Materials Science and Engineering with First Class or equivalent CGPA

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
